# BookApp

> A minimal reading social platform where readers track their books, share highlights, and discuss what they're reading with a community.

BookApp combines a personal reading library and EPUB reader with a social feed for posts, reels, stories, and direct messages between readers.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Social feed of posts and stories from readers you follow.
- [Sign in](/auth): Log in or create a BookApp account.

## Optional

- [Reels](/reels): Short-form video feed from the reading community (requires sign in).
- [Library](/library): Your personal book library and reading progress (requires sign in).
- [Messages](/messages): Direct conversations with other readers (requires sign in).
